diagrams.title: Venn Diagram - Addition Rule
diagrams.description: Shows two events A and B with their union, intersection, and individual areas
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how P(A∪B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A∩B)

diagrams.title: Tree Diagram - Conditional Probability
diagrams.description: Two-stage probability tree showing first event and then conditional second event
elements: First level branches: Event A and A'
Second level branches: B and B' from each first branch

diagrams.title: Probability Number Line
diagrams.description: Scale from 0 to 1 showing probability classifications
